completed_this_session.name: loadForDeck skips primary/partner wipe on same-deck revisit — fixes stuck-at-idle card-search on back-to-decks → re-open flow
CardSearchSection lastFiredSearchKeyRef dedupes StrictMode double-invoke — halves /cards/search on revisit (mirror of DUP-4 CommanderSearch fix)
Retroactive 02-06-SUMMARY.md + tick ROADMAP.md:57 — bookkeeping now matches the four feat(02-06) commits that actually shipped the plan

consoleGate allowlist now accepts @vite/client as a valid location for the 'Persistent storage not granted' warning — Vite's dev client wraps console.warn and rewrites the location, breaking the storage.ts pin. Widened locationIncludes to string | string[]. 15 e2e + 176 unit green.

remaining_followups.name: Cache-first commander hydration in loadForDeck — zero Scryfall calls on return visits; requires storing oracle_id alongside print id on deck row (card-cache keys on oracle_id)
Pre-existing Tailwind canonical-class lint warnings in CommanderPanel.tsx:22, :43

decisions.decision: Only wipe primaryCommander/partnerCommander when loadedDeckId !== incoming deckId; keep them on same-deck revisit
decisions.rationale: Same-deck flicker was causing the downstream searchKey to collapse to identical pre- and post-flicker values. React's Object.is dep check then suppressed the search effect re-fire, leaving card-search-store stuck at status:'idle' with results:[] even though 2 /cards/search requests had successfully been made and aborted

decisions.decision: Ref-keyed dedupe (lastFiredSearchKeyRef) in CardSearchSection mirroring DUP-4's CommanderSearch pattern
decisions.rationale: StrictMode double-invokes mount effects — only exposed when store already has primary at mount time (i.e. revisit path). Reload/first-open is absorbed by null-debouncedKey early-return. Ref-based dedupe preserves StrictMode's bug-surfacing value while no-oping identical re-invocations

decisions.decision: consoleGate BenignRule.locationIncludes: string | string[] with locationMatches() helper
decisions.rationale: Vite dev client wraps console.warn → msg.location() reports @vite/client:509 not storage.ts. Prod builds would also break the pin since storage.ts gets bundled into a hashed asset. Widening keeps the text match strict (still catches NEW benign-looking warnings) while handling dev + prod paths.

next_action: Housekeeping done — both should-have items (BOOK-1, FLAKE-1) closed. Options: (a) drop into Phase 3 (Deck Building & Card Display) via /gsd-discuss-phase 3 — no CONTEXT.md yet, requirements BUILD-01..08, DECK-09, UI-02, UI-04; (b) knock out the three nice-to-have FU-items before moving on; (c) push the 12 local commits to origin.
context_notes: Post-02.3 polish fully closed. BOOK-1 paper trail written retroactively from commit history (no code changed). FLAKE-1 root cause was Vite's dev-mode console.warn wrapping changing msg.location() — widened allowlist handles both dev and prod paths without loosening the text match. FU-2/3/4 are small enough to tackle inline during Phase 3 or defer; none are blocking. Working tree clean.
